name: How do I get Siri to behave consistently across my iPhone, iPad, and Mac?
description: Use the same Apple ID, language, region, and permissions across devices for more consistent Siri behavior.

mainEntity.name: How do I get Siri to behave consistently across my iPhone, iPad, and Mac?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you want smarter Siri behavior across Apple devices, focus on consistency: same Apple ID, same language, same region, and the same core permissions on each device. That makes handoff-style experiences and suggestions more predictable. For business or team workflows, custom Shortcuts can keep the process consistent across users.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use the same Apple ID, language, region, and permissions across devices for more consistent Siri behavior.
